conditions: The organization requires central audit access and workload administrators must not control the audit trail.
decision_context: Use when audit evidence ownership must be independent of workload teams.
exclusions: Destination policy, encryption, retention, event selectors, and Region design still require explicit configuration.

decision_criterion: Prefer dedicated evidence ownership when tamper resistance, central access, and separation from workload administration outweigh additional shared-account operations.

source_references.locator: Security OU – Log Archive account, opening security objectives
source_references.supported_proposition: A dedicated log archive centralizes controlled and durable security evidence.

statement: When centralized evidence and separation of duties are priorities, deliver organization-wide CloudTrail evidence to a dedicated log-archive ownership boundary separate from workload administration.
